hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="Brain-Dump.md"; if [ -f "$FILE" ] && [ -s "$FILE" ]; then echo "=== Brain Dump ==="; cat "$FILE"; echo; echo "Process these items: triage into the vault (create notes, add to projects, update Profile, or discard). Then clear Brain-Dump.md."; else echo "No brain dump items."; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.md ]]; then git add "$FILE" && git commit -m "vault: update $(basename "$FILE" .md)" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'cd /Users/giacomoguiulfoknell/Github/mind && git add -A -- "*.md" "Articles/" "Projects/" "Templates/" "TILs/" ".claude/" 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || git commit -m "vault: session sync" --quiet 2>/dev/null; true'
